_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to create and perform movement sequences that change elements like time, effort, and space.

_source.w: We are learning to create and perform movement sequences that change elements like time, effort, and space.
y: Creating sequences develops both our physical and creative abilities.
Performing for others builds confidence and presentation skills.
Modifying movement elements shows sophisticated understanding of how movement works.
eg: Creating a dance routine that uses changes in speed and energy.
Designing a gymnastics sequence that moves through different levels and directions.
Performing a group routine that synchronises movements in time.
Modifying a sequence to make it more dynamic by changing effort levels.
Creating a fitness circuit that uses different movement elements.
Evaluating our performance and making improvements based on feedback.
